name: knab
description: Read-only on-chain research tool for AIMS vaults. Reads blockchain data (prices, transactions, pool reserves). No wallet needed. All operations are read-only.
author: AIMS Protocol

tools.name: knab_brief
tools.description: Read-only decision summary with top picks, caution picks, avoid picks. No wallet needed.

tools.name: knab_vaults
tools.description: List all vaults with prices, APY, reserves, activity. No wallet needed.

tools.name: knab_estimate
tools.description: Estimate future value after fees. No wallet needed.

tools.name: knab_assess
tools.description: Scored recommendation: OBSERVE, SMALL_TEST, or AVOID. No wallet needed.

tools.name: knab_dashboard
tools.description: Pool reserves, stability windows, coverage ratio, health score. No wallet needed.

tools.name: knab_verify
tools.description: Preflight verification: live prices, pool balances, source verification, control surface. No wallet needed.

tools.name: knab_research
tools.description: Research a vault: on-chain transactions, top holders, profits. No wallet needed.

tools.name: knab_discover
tools.description: Scan all 9 vaults across 3 chains. Build opportunity report. No wallet needed.

quickstart.description: All tools are read-only. No wallet needed.
